title: SlashBlade: Refabricated
description: SlashBlade: Resharped unofficial Fabric port. A SlashBlade mod fork for Modern Minecraft.
body:
## [SlashBlade: Resharped](https://modrinth.com/mod/slashblade-resharped) unofficial Fabric port

Welcome to SlashBlade for Fabric.

Still, it is a fan work of Demon Blade, DMC & PSO2, which aims to add the DMC-ish KATANA in the game.

Integrations:
- JEI integrations.
- Data-driven Custom Slashblade.

**Note:**
- **This mod requires [Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port).**
- **If you installed [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)(version<0.6.0), you must install [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) as well, or else SlashBlade won't render correctly.**
- **You can install [Modern KeyBinding](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernkeybinding) or other similar mod, so that you can triggle SummonBlade & SpecialMove correctly.**
